Keys.Name: ApplyInStartingDungeon
Keys.Description: Apply OSP to the new-game starting dungeon

Keys.Name: GrantTemporarySpellbookOnEntry
Keys.Description: If disabled, a guaranteed spellbook is somewhere in the dungeon

Keys.Name: KeepLearnedSpellsOnExit
Keys.Description: Keep spells learned in the dungeon when leaving

Keys.Name: PureChaosMode
Keys.Description: Dungeon starting gear will be inconsistent across entries

Keys.Name: TrueOSPMode
Keys.Description: Start each dungeon with literally nothing

Keys.Name: GuaranteedPathToKillAllEnemies
Keys.Description: Ensure a weapon path exists to kill all enemies with melee weapons

Keys.Name: DungeonSpoilerLog
Keys.Description: Print dungeon weapon logic to Player.log

Keys.Name: EnemyDefeatNotifications
Keys.Description: Show Enemies Defeated progress after each enemy kill
